programme.desc: A fake robbery is caught on camera, and Nick Wallis also reveals how secret cameras are helping to catch fly tippers.(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Drama. Isaac has been going off the rails since his father left years ago. But now his dad's back and with a startling secret.(n)

programme.title: McLintock! (1963)
programme.desc: A hard-drinking cattle baron is determined to stop events spiralling out of control when his estranged wife turns up demanding a divorce. Meanwhile, an ardent suitor is pursuing his flighty daughter, and corrupt government agents are turning a blind eye to land grabbers. Comedy Western, starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara, Yvonne de Carlo, Patrick Wayne and Stefanie Powers.(n)

programme.title: Flying Tigers (1942)
programme.desc: An American pilot leads a squadron of volunteer aviators to help China's fledgling air force fight the Japanese during the Second World War. However, he has to contend with the consequences when the actions of an arrogant hotshot pilot lead to the death of a fellow veteran airman. Drama, starring John Wayne, John Carroll, Anna Lee and Paul Kelly.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale.(n)

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere.(n)

programme.title: Assassin's Creed (2016)
programme.desc: A convict facing execution is recruited for a secret experiment where his consciousness is sent back in time to experience the life of his ancestor - a 15th-century ancestor battling a secret society. With the same evil organisation plotting world domination in the present, he must master his predecessor's skills and unlock his secret knowledge to defeat them. Action adventure based on the video game series, starring Michael Fassbender, Marion Cotillard, Jeremy Irons and Brendan Gleeson.(n)

programme.title: Macbeth (2015)
programme.desc: A nobleman in medieval Scotland hears a prophecy that he will become king. He and his wife conspire to murder the monarch and take his place on the throne, but both are consumed with madness and paranoia as they seek to ruthlessly eliminate any threats to their continued rule. Shakespeare's tragedy, starring Michael Fassbender, Marion Cotillard, Paddy Considine and David Thewlis.(n)

programme.title: The Purge: Anarchy (2014)
programme.desc: A woman, her daughter and a couple are lost on the streets during a dangerous annual night when all laws are suspended. A gun-toting loner comes to their aid and fights to protect them, while also plotting to take advantage of the situation to pursue a murderous mission of his own. Horror sequel, starring Frank Grillo and Carmen Ejogo.(n)

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey.(n)

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan.(n)

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Constable (1960)
programme.desc: A flu epidemic leaves a police station short of staff, forcing a desperate inspector to send four bungling trainees on the beat. The inept would-be bobbies manage to increase the crime rate even before they have started work, and their long-suffering sergeant faces an uphill battle to whip them into shape. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims.(n)

programme.title: Life of Pi (2012)
programme.desc: A writer interviews a man about the extraordinary events of his life. He describes his childhood in India, living in the zoo run by his father, and how the family and their animals were forced to relocate to Canada when he was a teenager. However, during the sea voyage, the ship sank and he was left adrift in a small boat with a ferocious tiger. Ang Lee's adventure based on Yann Martel's novel, starring Suraj Sharma and Irrfan Khan.(n)

programme.title: Deadpool (2016)
programme.desc: A fast-talking former mercenary develops terminal cancer, and agrees to be the subject in a shady experiment in the hope of a cure. The procedure leaves him horribly disfigured, but also possessing superhuman abilities which he immediately puts to use in a quest for revenge on the man responsible for his hideous appearance. Superhero comedy adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds and Morena Baccarin.(n)

programme.title: Buried (2010)
programme.desc: An American truck driver working in Iraq is kidnapped by guerrillas, who seal him in a wooden box and bury it in the desert. Discovering his cell phone has been left in the box with him, he uses this fragile link to the outside world to try to get help - but his supply of air is running low and even he does not know where he is. Thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds.(n)

programme.title: Sicilian Ghost Story (2017)
programme.desc: Luna, a 12-year-old girl who has fallen for her classmate, ventures deep into enchanted Sicilian forests to find him, unaware of how thick the mystery behind his strange disappearance is. Drama, starring Julia Jedlikowska, Gaetano Fernandez and Corinne Musallari.(n)

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde.(n)

programme.title: Freedom Radio (1940)
programme.desc: A Viennese doctor tries to maintain business as usual while living under Nazi rule. However, events take a sickening turn when his wife begins wholeheartedly espousing Hitler's views - prompting him to start broadcasting Allied propaganda from a secret transmitter. Second World War drama, starring Clive Brook, Diana Wynyard, Raymond Huntley and Derek Farr.(n)

programme.title: Gun Fury (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and his fiancee take the stagecoach to California, where they intend to start a new life in the wake of the Civil War. However, during the journey an ex-Confederate outlaw and his gang of thugs attack the coach and kidnap the bride-to-be. Distraught and wounded, the rancher sets out to rescue her and punish her abductors. Western, with Rock Hudson, Donna Reed, Lee Marvin and Phil Carey.(n)

programme.title: Gallipoli (1981)
programme.desc: Two patriotic Australians join the army to fight during the First World War. However, their youthful idealism is quickly eroded by the harsh reality of the conflict, and their friendship is tested to the very limits of endurance as they prepare for combat ahead of the pivotal battle of Gallipoli in Turkey. Drama, directed by Peter Weir, starring Mel Gibson, Mark Lee, Bill Kerr and David Argue.(n)

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: The trainee crew members of the starship Enterprise embark on their maiden flight, which pits them against a Romulan commander from the future who is planning a horrific revenge on those he blames for a tragedy in his own time. Sci-fi adventure based on the original TV series, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto, Eric Bana, Zoe Saldana and Leonard Nimoy.(n)

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores the Georgian era in her home city of Bristol. She takes a horse-drawn carriage ride to explore Clifton's Georgian architecture, samples some of the backstreet gin that was considered a threat to civilisation, and discovers the ingenious story behind the world's first chocolate factory. She also delves into the city's links with the slave trade, uncovering horrific tales in the historical records. Plus, aerial archaeologist Ben Robinson provides a bird's-eye view of how 18th-century wealth transformed the city.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Drive It

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank visit a house full of rare toys and come away with King Kong memorabilia and a train set - however, they find their purchases are not as valuable as they had hoped.(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank view a collection of opera house memorabilia and haggle over the price of a Victorian dolls' house.(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: Dave has a BMW X5 armed response vehicle build to oversee, and is also tasked with repairing a car damaged during a high-speed chase.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond take on a challenge to find an alternative to the expensive diesel-fuelled hatchbacks driven by British police officers. Alan Carr and Justin Lee Collins take up the gauntlet as the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and his team of explorers head to Greenland in the Arctic. Kayaking the world's largest fjord, they dodge giant icebergs and hungry polar bears.(n)

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of New Nordic cuisine - Copenhagen - where he goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers. He's cheered to find plenty of traditional favourites, such as the city's famous Smorrebrod open sandwiches on rye bread, delicious poached turbot with cabbage and lemon butter sauce and - of course - the ubiquitous Danish pastry. Back at home, Rick cooks fried pork belly with lovage potatoes and parsley sauce, which has been voted Denmark's favourite dish.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson puts the Mercedes-Benz CLK Black Series through its paces, and Richard Hammond tests the limits of the Audi RS6 in a race against two French skiers. James May sets the show's bravery expert a daunting challenge involving an MG Maestro, while actors Rupert Penry-Jones and Peter Firth go head to head as Stars in the Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May explore the old adage that having owned an Alfa Romeo is the sign of a real automobile addict, testing out three second-hand models, each bought for less than £1,000. The unwieldy Bentley Brooklands receives a power test, and Gavin & Stacey's James Corden and Rob Brydon go head to head as the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies, aka The Taskmaster, sets challenges including trying to paint the best picture of a horse while riding a horse, melon-eating and bath-emptying to Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe, ultimately deciding who wins. Alex Horne acts as Davies' right-hand-man, coaxing the contestants to reveal how comic, creative and seriously competitive they are.(n)

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Cadiz in Spain, where he samples two of the city's most revered culinary stars - fresh tuna and Manzanilla sherry. Rick is captivated by the narrow winding streets as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders, whose influence on the city can still be seen to this day. Back home, he prepares flamenco eggs and arroz verde, or green rice, made with garlic, parsley, clams and prawns, producing the vibrant colours of the Spanish flag.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tries to prove the Nissan GT-R is faster than the celebrated Bullet Train in a race across Japan with Richard Hammond and James May. programme.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Sordid speculation dogged the life of Prince Albert Victor, who was even a suspect in the Jack the Ripper case.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945.(n)

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn explores St Pancras station in London and its sister hotel - built to show off the might of the Midlands, and learns about Castle Howard station in North Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Burton Constable Hall near Hull, which is home to a collection of treasures. Objects brought in to be valued include a ship's anchor that was found in a garden pond, a medal awarded to sailor for helping to recover Captain Scott's ship from the Antarctic in 1901, some 17th-century flat pack furniture, and a flimsy booklet that proved to be a profitable investment.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist reflects on the remarkable abilities that some plants and animals possess, such as the electric eel that helped inspire the battery and flowers that 'talk' to bees using electrical signals.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines the emperor penguin and the wood frog, both of which survive in conditions so cold they seem to defy the laws of nature. The emperor is the only penguin able to breed on Antarctic sea ice during winter, while the wood frog can survive up to 65 per cent of its body mass freezing during its hibernation.(n)

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: How the SAS War Crimes Investigation Team tried to pinpoint the location of Gestapo officers who were wanted for a host of atrocities.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the first leg of his second journey, Michael Portillo heads to Kirkcaldy in Fife, finding out along the way how the mill town of Preston in Lancashire gave birth to the Temperance Movement. In Blackpool, he enjoys a performance in the Tower Ballroom and discovers the railways had a direct impact on the town's birth as a resort. After a stroll along the pier with local comedian Joey Blower, Michael visits Morecambe Bay.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the second leg of his journey from Preston to Kirkcaldy, returning to the historic Settle-Carlisle line he helped save from dereliction when he was Minister of State for Transport in the 1980s. Here, engineer Tony Feshini describes what life was like for the people who originally built Ribblehead Viaduct, before Michael visits Dent, Cumbria, home to the highest railway station in England.(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels through Argentina, starting his journey at British-built railway station in Buenos Aires and taking an overnight train to the pampas lowlands. In the major port of Bahia Blanca, Chris meets four veterans of the Falklands War and finds out what the locals now think about the British, before ending his journey by riding La Trochita, known in English as the Old Patagonian Express.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in the picturesque village of Thornton-le-Dale.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a car auction business. A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position.(n)

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville decides a fashion makeover is needed to impress Stephanie from the local boutique, but Arkwright's meddling soon puts paid to any romantic dalliance. Roy Clarke's classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason.(n)

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys decides Arkwright needs a lesson in politeness, and convinces him a writer for the Good Shop Guide is doing the rounds. programme.title: Jim Clark: The Quiet Champion
programme.desc: Profile of the two-time Formula One champion, who was killed at the height of his career. programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that spin and weave, contemplating the history of silk production and its romantic origins in China.(n)

programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals why male seahorses give birth, and looks at how hyena packs are dominated by the female members.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey following George Bradshaw's footsteps, as the third leg of his trip from Preston to Kirkcaldy sees him embarking on a two-day tour of the Lake District. He begins in Windermere, where he travels by steamboat to the north of the lake, and continues to Claife viewing station, where he learns about the water pollution caused by increasing levels of tourism. He spends the night in Grasmere, and the following day reaches Kendal, where he buys local delicacies and meets a farmer who explains the impact of railways on farming practices.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches Carlisle, where he meets a descendant of the Border Reivers, a group of ancient lawless clansmen mentioned in Victorian train enthusiast George Bradshaw's book. From there, he travels to Gretna Green to learn about the village's famous marriage trade, explores an old Ministry of Defence munitions site, and visits the centre of Glasgow, which is enjoying a revival in popularity.(n)

programme.title: David Jason: Planes, Trains and Automobiles
programme.desc: The actor flies into the heart of a volcano, gets a surprise in a drag-racing car, hits the road with an American trucker and takes to the skies in a vintage Second World War plane.(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch discovers fellow inmates at Slade Prison are planning an escape over Christmas - and is so convinced the bid is doomed to fail that he takes refuge in the hospital so he cannot be blamed when the tunnel is found. programme.title: What a Carry On!
programme.desc: A collection of riotous moments from the comedy favourites, featuring Carry On regulars Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques.(n)

programme.title: Jackie Stewart: The Flying Scot
programme.desc: Portrait of the former racing driver, winner of three Formula One World Championships and 27 Grands Prix. The programme chronicles his early career and subsequent success as an internationally respected businessman in charge of his own Formula One team. With archive footage and contributions by friends and colleagues, including Niki Lauda, Emerson Fittipaldi, Sean Connery, Murray Walker and Edsel Ford, as well as Ken Tyrrell's last-ever interview.(n)

programme.desc: Cameras follow Thames Valley Police's investigation into the murder of 64-year-old Hang Yin Leung, who died after being violently assaulted during a burglary at her Milton Keynes home in January 2017. Filmed over 12 months, the programme interweaves the police's enquiries with an intimate portrait of a British-Chinese family coming to terms with the impact of murder, with the story of migrants from Hong Kong who came to the UK in search of a better life for their son unfolding alongside the hunt for the killers.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Snoop Dogs
programme.desc: Cameras go inside the locked-down houses of well-known faces around the country. However, the filming is done by the celebrity homeowners' hounds - so-called Snoop Dogs. As devastating storms batter the UK, the helicopter crew is called out to rescue a woman trapped by deadly rising river water.(n)

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon Moon and his dog Kanto are hot on the heels of some burglary suspects, while spot-checks by the unit on the A1 turn up a carrier bag full of cash. Jason Baxter rushes to the scene of an accident where the driver was thrown clear of the car, only for another crash to take place - this time involving a line of vehicles.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron and David realise they can make changes to suit Emmett's education needs, Ned treats Yashvi at an expensive restaurant, and Toadie learns who Dee's biological father is.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ryder wants to organise a gig for his dad, while Bella has problems involving Colby and Nikau, leading to some catastrophic events. Tori lashes out at Jasmine.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. Ion is from Romania and wants to make £40,000 from benefits to help him build a new house for his family back in his home village, while Katarina arrived from Slovakia seven years ago and has 11 children and 11 grandchildren living in and around an estate in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Nottingham resident Viorel is 25 and lost both legs in an accident in his native Romania when he was seven, and now wants to pursue a career in the movies.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition of the programme focuses on large families who depend on the benefits system, including 64-year-old Peter Rolfe, whose children - by 15 different women - range in ages from three to 43, of which he is the sole carer for six. He has been fighting his council in the Isle of Wight for a much bigger house and is also at loggerheads with the benefits office for capping his weekly payment. West Midlands mother-of-eight Marie Buchanan has recently split from her partner and is looking for a larger home, while Ipswich couple the Fisks have been in dispute with their neighbours, who objected to two houses being knocked into one to accommodate them and their 13 children.(n)

programme.title: Dirty Dancing (1987)
programme.desc: A dance instructor at a 1960s resort hotel fears his career will be jeopardised when his regular partner is forced to pull out of an important show in which they are due to perform. Luckily, a naive teenager is happy to step in, and is treated to a whirlwind holiday education in life, love and expressing herself. Romantic drama, with Patrick Swayze, Jennifer Grey and Jerry Orbach.(n)

Eventually, a partnership made on the dance floor with a local waiter leads to a passionate romance, but meets with the disapproval of her family. Drama, starring Romola Garai, Diego Luna, Jonathan Jackson, January Jones, and featuring a cameo by Patrick Swayze.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An old friend of Jessica's becomes the prime suspect in a murder investigation when a decapitated body is found. Starring Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett, Castle and the team investigate when the creator of a hit sketch comedy series is strangled with his own tie and thrown down a lift shaft.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy discovers two suicide victims were participating in clinical trials of an experimental antidepressant, prompting him to charge the drug company's CEO with second-degree murder. In court the defence argues all medical research carries an element of risk and the judge rules prosecution evidence inadmissible, leaving the outcome on a knife-edge. Sam Waterston and Dennis Farina star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy widow and her daughter are implicated in the death of a hitman out on parole - and it's up to the squad to find out whether the pair hired the victim to kill a rich relative. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A double homicide is linked to diamonds used to fund civil war in Sierra Leone, and the detectives uncover the extent of the fighting when warring factions are found in the United States. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A controversial talk show host is shot dead in the street and suspicion initially falls on a woman who was suing him for sexual harassment. However, later evidence leads the team to the victim's wife, who stands to inherit $20million, and a stalker who claims to be having an affair with her. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two room-mates are found bludgeoned to death in their flat, and the handyman is the prime suspect. As his options run out, he takes a hostage, forcing Southerlyn into a course of action that could jeopardise her career. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Gene Silvers, and Elisabeth Rohm.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs throws himself back into his work following his near-death experience, updating his appearance and tackling a new risky case alongside DEA agent Luis Mitchell, who wants help bringing down a drugs cartel. Concerned about his colleague's apparent enthusiasm to re-enter the field, DiNozzo discovers Mitchell is the son of a former NCIS agent who gave his life trying to save Gibbs' late wife and daughter, and this attachment is causing Gibbs to break his own rule against personal involvement in a case. However, a significant danger is posed by Benson Long, the cartel's head, and Mitchell's top target.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine is found murdered in Quantico, mere hours after calling Gibbs to discuss a possible case. In response, Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to run surveillance on a lieutenant and his wife, who may be connected to the death. Starring Mark Harmon, Emily Wickersham and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby visits a pharmaceutical lab to investigate a murder case, but when armed men storm the facility and hold everyone hostage, she is trapped within the building with no means of communicating with the outside world. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The notorious Tri-State Sniper appears to have claimed another victim when a petty officer is shot dead in a crowded park. However, when the team discovers the killer in question was already in custody on the day of the shooting, it becomes clear a copy-cat is on the loose. As their investigation progresses, the agents learn the victim was recently found guilty of placing a camera in the female changing rooms of the USS Camden, earning himself plenty of enemies - but did any of them hate him enough to kill?(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Lieutenant JAG lawyer - who appeared to have a happy life - is found dead by her parents in an apparent suicide. Gibbs and the team interview family and friends from her past and present in a bid to unravel the facts.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man convicted of rape is exonerated and released 16 years later. However, on the night of his release, the daughter of the woman he was convicted of raping is also raped and murdered - and he is SVU's prime suspect. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man uses a fake identity to lure a woman into bed, destroying her family, so Barba tries to get him convicted of rape - only to face a sceptical legal team. Raul Esparza stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda.(n)

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Two singing-telegram girls witness a murder, placing their lives in jeopardy. Laura and Steele try to protect the duo, while hunting for the killers.(n)

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Steele hunt for a culprit when someone embezzles from a society of mystery writer's treasury.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica joins forces with Scotland Yard to investigate the murder of an heiress's bodyguard and the theft of a priceless necklace. Starring Angela Lansbury and David Hemmings.(n)

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A death occurs in some woods, and Castle becomes obsessed with the case because it reminds him of a pivotal event, 30 years earlier, that inspired him to become a writer. Meanwhile, Beckett reaches a turning point in her life. Crime drama, starring Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A convicted child murderer is struck and left for dead by a motorist just weeks after his prison release, but Fontana and Green are initially unenthusiastic about finding out who ran him over. It is not until the killer dies from his injuries that they investigate inside the prison where he served his sentence - and uncover evidence that leads McCoy to make a startling discovery. Starring Dennis Farina.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Borgia prosecute a famous basketball player accused of murdering a fan who had been harassing him for some time. They discover the star's fingerprints in the victim's apartment, but the evidence linking him to the crime scene is dismissed as inadmissible because the detectives cut corners to find a match on the police database. Starring Sam Waterston and Annie Parisse.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl is found suffocated to death in Central Park, Briscoe and Green discover her adoptive mother's attempts to discipline the child may have inadvertently caused the tragedy. However, the case is thrown into confusion when a post-mortem reveals she may actually have died of an allergic reaction. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A young Navy Seaman is found dead, with his eyes gouged out, after being involved in a car accident. Director Vance makes a rare return to field duty, pairing up with Gibbs to investigate when it becomes clear the killing seems to be connected to the case of Kip Klugman, a former NCIS agent he once locked up for stealing evidence. Starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby visits a pharmaceutical lab to investigate a murder case, but when armed men storm the facility and hold everyone hostage, she is trapped within the building with no means of communicating with the outside world. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate the murder of a retired US Navy lieutenant commander, and the inquiry forces Ducky to reveal he has been working as part of a secret society dedicated to solving cold cases. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his old flame, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. Travelling to the crime scene to conduct a joint murder-kidnapping investigation, Dinozzi and McGee offer their assistance in searching for the missing doctors. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Sean Murray, with Scottie Thompson.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magician disappears during a live-burial trick and is later found dead miles away from the location of his performance. Goren and Eames' investigation takes them deep into the mysterious world of magic as they try to unravel the conjuror's final act to identify the murderer.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An aspiring Olympic athlete claims she is a rape victim, but the publicity could threaten her Olympic future, and reveal some shocking details about her sordid personal life.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson discovers that a young man facing rape charges is the son of a sergeant - her first police partner - who comes to her asking to cash in on an a favour that she owes him. Mariska Hargitay stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins leads a sting operation to take down child pornographer Teddy Hawkins, also well-known as the owner of a chain of successful restaurants. However, when the team examines Teddy's cyber credentials, they discover he is connected to Deputy Commissioner Abraham, who vehemently denies any involvement in Hawkins' illicit distribution ring. With two high-profile arrests to their name, Rollins and her colleagues must work quickly to justify their actions before Abraham uses his power to make the charges 'go away'. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape charge Barba is bringing against a popular actor is placed in jeopardy, prompting Rollins to step in and take matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza and Kelli Giddish.(n)

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura takes on the case of a missing restaurant reviewer, with Steele going undercover as the critic to discover the truth.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A bedridden Jessica accidentally overhears a murder plot over the telephone but is unable to convince anyone that the threat is real, until a millionaire is found dead in his home.(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Nick continue to work undercover infiltrating a meth pipeline, but their covert mission goes sideways when both disappear. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the drug investigation-turned-rescue operation. Andy must figure out how to cope with the transformation of her own life as well as those of her friends at the station and continue to do the job she loves. Starring Missy Peregrym.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found beaten to death in his home, prompting detectives Fontana and Green to suspect the victim's wife and the contractor who installed the security system. McCoy and Southerlyn investigate an affair between the two, and seek to turn them against each other, but a second unexpected crime slows down their case.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A car chase through Manhattan leaves one man dead and a teenager injured, leading Fontana and Green to discover the victim was being followed after massacring a hunting party. As the man who led the chase is publicly lauded for his brave efforts, McCoy and Borgia make their case that his poor decisions only endangered other lives. Starring Sam Waterston and Annie Parisse.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is found dead in an apartment building, and Briscoe and Green suspect an improper website may have played a part in her murder. As McCoy and Southerlyn investigate the case further, they realise the victim's best friend, who was reluctant to come forward as a witness, may provide the answers. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse L Martin and Elisabeth Rohm.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an investment analyst whose dealings with a bankrupt company left many clients penniless. Overcoming initial problems with identifying the victim, they pick up on a clue that leads them to the dead man's attorney, who was apparently the last person to see him alive. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The notorious Tri-State Sniper appears to have claimed another victim when a petty officer is shot dead in a crowded park. However, when the team discovers the killer in question was already in custody on the day of the shooting, it becomes clear a copy-cat is on the loose. As their investigation progresses, the agents learn the victim was recently found guilty of placing a camera in the female changing rooms of the USS Camden, earning himself plenty of enemies - but did any of them hate him enough to kill?(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate the murder of a retired US Navy lieutenant commander, and the inquiry forces Ducky to reveal he has been working as part of a secret society dedicated to solving cold cases. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Kyle Friedgen is accused of killing his ex-girlfriend, but while his case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant, his life and reputation are marred by suspicion that he got away with murder. Determined to clear his name in full, Friedgen volunteers to be court-martialed, on the condition that the NCIS team conducts its own investigation. Meanwhile, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems. Naval crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham, with Jamie Bamber.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The two Marine brothers of a sailor battling leukaemia are killed in the line of duty, and to spare the servicemen's family further grief, the secretary of the US Navy seeks the NCIS team's help in locating a suitable bone marrow donor. Meanwhile, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for Thanksgiving. Military crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A boxer celebrating a victory is killed while trying to stop a bar brawl that has spilled out onto the street. When Logan discovers he has a personal connection to the case, he and Wheeler find themselves investigating amateur boxing and uncover a world full of secrets and betrayals.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The CEO of a record label and his protege are questioned by officers for their suspected involvement in a transgender student's assault. Mariska Hargitay stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is attacked in her own home, and the man who once stalked her becomes the prime suspect. Guest starring Chris Bauer (True Blood).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and her team participate in a city-wide operation to close in on people charged with exploiting underage Catholic schoolchildren, with judges, legislators, lawyers and even members of the NYPD all inplicated in the scandal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Countryside 999
programme.desc: The work of the emergency services in rural Britain, from the police to paramedics and air-sea rescue. programme.desc: Tina Watkins has long struggled to get on the housing ladder in the UK. Now, she has decided to make the most of the incredibly good value property in Spain's Granada province and buy her first-ever home. With her best friend Jamie along to help, Jasmine Harman shows Tina just how far her £19,000 budget will stretch.(n)

programme.desc: Prog rocker Rick Wakeman and actor friend Ian Lavender embark on the cross-country treasure-hunting challenge around Norfolk, joined by experts Raj Bisram and David Harper. programme.title: Countryside 999
programme.desc: Dumfries police attend a collision between a car and a horsedrawn carriage carrying a bridal party. Plus, the Cairngorm ski patrol helps two injured skiers, and the Royal Navy Search and Rescue helicopter crew undertakes a risky manoeuvre beneath electricity pylons to reach a man in the sea.(n)

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The investigators take part in a dramatic dawn raid on one of the city's largest illegal dog-fighting organisations, where they find abused canines and evidence of drug use and unlawful gambling.(n)

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Emergency animal medical technician AJ Meadows battles to save seven dogs locked in an overheated car with no food or water.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charles Hanson and Mark Stacey seek out hidden gems in Ely, before competing with their finds at an auction in Bourne End, Buckinghamshire.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst and Christina Trevanion's trip reaches its third leg in Somerset and Devon, where Tim examines a Boer War pipe and Christina finds a Victorian lectern.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The search reaches the New Forest, and after an encounter with some ponies, Tim Medhurst buys a horse, while Christina Trevanion turns farrier. Other items include a George III commode and some Scottish treasure.(n)

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard road trips to Cornwall for a major buying mission. In Penzance, he haggles with a hoarder who owns a reclamation yard, before heading to the county's busiest auction house.(n)

programme.title: Born Mucky: Life on the Farm

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The team investigates an abandoned nursing home, and see a shadowy figure in a room where a patient died.(n)

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a historic building in Derby, a cottage in Faversham, Kent, and a two-bedroom flat in Durham. They then follow the sales at auction and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings, returning after three months to review their progress.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Mike and Amanda Gadd and their two children have always holidayed on the Algarve, a place that holds a special place in their hearts. Mike often works away with his job as a salesman, so they've decided to buy a holiday home there to give them a place to spend quality time together. Ben Hillman shows them five properties around their favourite town of Vilamoura for their £127,000 budget.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor Nigel Havers and his ex-agent Michael Whitehall embark on a treasure-hunting trip across the West Country. Travelling via Bentley and TVR, and with £400 each in hand, the pair's trip sees them meet some Bristol Savages, and take in a spot of Georgian elegance as they hear the story of 'the King of Bath'. The duo are aided in their search by experts Margie Cooper and James Braxton, but will it be Nigel's old cockle bucket or Michael's tambourine that secures the biggest return at auction?(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British house-hunters Ric and Nita Halstead, who are seeking a dream home in Miami, receive expert advice before buying. Amanda Lamb shows them round an art deco house, a Mediterranean-style villa and a Florida ranch.(n)

programme.title: Can't Bully Me
programme.desc: Documentary following four youngsters suffering from the traumatic effects of bullying as they attend the Red Balloon Learner Centres in Cambridge and north-west London, which deal with children unable to attend school due to past experiences. The film charts their progress as they overcome fears and rebuild their confidence to return to education and mainstream life.(n)

programme.title: Opening Up the Soane
programme.desc: Documentary about the extensive refurbishment of Sir John Soane's Museum to restore the building to its original glory.(n)

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population.(n)

programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra.(n)

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English.(n)

programme.title: The Boy Who Stole a Million (1960)
programme.desc: A boy robs a bank to pay for repairs on his father's car, and is pursued by the police and criminals after the money. Comedy adventure, starring Virgilio Teixeira and Maurice Reyna.(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks up The Great Orme in North Wales and beside a railway in West Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb comes to the rescue of Peter Sullivan and Sally Turner, who are searching for an affordable holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Among the choices are a new apartment for £66,000 and a traditional villa.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A bomb is found in a nightclub which German scientists claim cannot be disarmed, and Ash receives a mysterious message. Guest starring Judy Geeson (the original 1970s Poldark).(n)

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow heads for 18th-century Paris to discover how the insanitary living conditions endured by its poorest residents helped bring about the French Revolution. He visits a perfumer to re-create some of the city's unsavoury smells, and finds out what happened to the thousands of bodies that overflowed from cemeteries during the Terror of 1793. He also tries his hand at tanning leather the traditional way - using dog faeces and urine.(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Series recreating the court cases of three of the Second World War's most notorious Nazis, using eyewitness interviews and archive footage, as well as considering the interviews they underwent at the hands of lawyers and psychologists. The first episode focuses on the trial of Albert Speer, Hitler's chief architect and armaments minister, regarded by many as a 'good' Nazi. Nathaniel Parker stars.(n)

programme.title: Can't Bully Me
programme.desc: Documentary following four youngsters suffering from the traumatic effects of bullying as they attend the Red Balloon Learner Centres in Cambridge and north-west London, which deal with children unable to attend school due to past experiences. programme.title: Golden Years (2016)
programme.desc: A retired couple face a grim future after a financial crisis costs them both their pensions. Refusing to take the situation lying down, they resolve to take back what is rightfully theirs with a series of daring bank robberies. Comedy, starring Bernard Hill, Virginia McKenna, Simon Callow and Sue Johnston.(n)

programme.title: Common
programme.desc: One-off drama from Jimmy McGovern, exploring the possible consequences of the UK's Joint Enterprise law, by which more than one person can be charged with the same offence. Seventeen-year-old Johnjo gives his cousin Tony and some friends a lift to a pizza parlour for food, unaware their real intention is to 'sort out' a local loudmouth. Things soon get out of hand, however, and an innocent bystander is fatally stabbed - and despite being in the car all the time, Johnjo finds himself charged with murder along with everyone else. Nico Mirallegro heads a cast that also includes Susan Lynch, Daniel Mays, Jodhi May, Robert Pugh and Michelle Fairley.(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises.(n)

programme.title: Dream the Impossible (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about paraplegic motorcycle racer and paralympic skier Talan Skeels-Piggins, who has founded a charity to train paralysed people to ride adapted motorbikes.(n)

programme.title: Music Within (2007)
programme.desc: The true story of Richard Pimentel, a brilliant public speaker with a troubled past, who returns from Vietnam severely hearing-impaired and finds a new purpose in his landmark efforts on the behalf of Americans with disabilities. Biographical drama, starring Ron Livingston, Melissa George and Michael Sheen.(n)

programme.title: Spivs (2004)
programme.desc: A professional con-man spends his time honing the skills of his protege and making sure his gang of conniving criminals stays out of trouble. However, when a simple heist backfires the ragtag group are left with a lorry-load of illegal immigrants on their hands - and an angry smuggler with revenge on his mind soon adds to their woes. Crime drama, starring Ken Stott,, Nick Moran and Dominic Monaghan.(n)

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps British couple George and Frances Phipps find a new home on the Costa del Sol for £100,000. Among the properties she suggests are a white house in a Spanish village and a luxury apartment near a marina.(n)

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics.(n)

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams.(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises.(n)

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the contrasting stories of people responding to the traumas of the Second World War. While Kent student Daphne Baker set her heart on becoming a head teacher as her contribution to the war effort, conman Neville Heath embarked on a fraudulent spree preying on vulnerable women.(n)

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra.(n)

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex.(n)

programme.title: Blind Corner (1964)
programme.desc: A composer's wife learns her husband plans to cut her out of his will, so conspires with her lover to murder him first. Crime drama, starring William Sylvester and Barbara Shelley.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British couple Dave and Sue Lewington weigh up their options as they trawl Florida's Sun Coast, from Tampa to Sarasota, in search of a home for less than £120,000. Presenter Amanda Lamb offers them expert guidance.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: The team deals with a bomb at a gas works, only to discover another explosive device - which is set to go off at a specific time.(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises.(n)

programme.title: A Jubilee Tribute to the Queen by the Prince of Wales
programme.desc: Prince Charles pays a personal tribute to Her Majesty to mark her 60-year reign. He reflects on various public events and private family moments over the past six decades and shows previously unseen photographs and home movies - some of which were shot by the Queen herself.(n)

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Lady Persie's life has become increasingly complex, as she continues her illicit affair and pursues her right-wing political interests with little regard for the potential danger to those she loves. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes prepares for motherhood by having her picture taken by celebrated photographer Cecil Beaton - a visit that causes excitement for one particular member of the downstairs staff - and Sir Hallam finds himself dragged into the crisis surrounding the abdication of Edward VIII facing the British monarchy. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Anne Reid and Claire Foy star in the period drama.(n)

programme.title: Jasper Jones (2017)
programme.desc: When a town outcast suspected of murder shows 14-year-old Charlie Bucktin a dead body, the teenager attempts to find the killer. Mystery thriller, starring Levi Miller, Aaron McGrath and Angourie Rice.(n)
